title: analytics — OpenTelemetry metrics
description: Per-provider capture + delivery + retry + circuit-breaker + batching + sampling metrics. Distinct from analytics.json (which is behavior signal for growth dashboards); metrics are OPS signal for on-call.

metrics.name: stackra.analytics.events.captured.total
metrics.description: outcome: captured / suppressed_by_consent / suppressed_by_sampling / suppressed_by_provider_off / refused_by_validator.

metrics.name: stackra.analytics.dispatch.duration_ms
metrics.description: DispatchToProviderJob duration — tests provider round-trip. Cardinality: bounded by provider count.

metrics.name: stackra.analytics.deliveries.by_state_total
metrics.description: state: pending / dispatching / delivered / failed / rate_limited / circuit_open / suppressed_*. Fed from AnalyticsDelivery status transitions.

metrics.name: stackra.analytics.deliveries.attempts
metrics.description: Distribution of attempts required to reach terminal state per delivery.

metrics.name: stackra.analytics.batch.size
metrics.description: Events per batch flush. High values indicate healthy batching; consistently low values (~1) indicate the batch buffer is undersubscribed.

metrics.name: stackra.analytics.batch.buffer_depth.gauge
metrics.description: Current buffer depth per (tenant, provider). Sampled every 30s. Backpressure signal — sustained > threshold triggers AnalyticsBatchBackpressureNotification.

metrics.name: stackra.analytics.circuit_breaker.state.gauge
metrics.description: Encoded state: 0=closed, 1=half_open, 2=open. Enables 'how many breakers open right now' dashboards.

metrics.name: stackra.analytics.sampling.rolled_total
metrics.description: outcome: dispatch / suppress. Ratio matches configured sampling_rate over long enough window.

metrics.name: stackra.analytics.identity.merge_events.total
metrics.description: Enterprise-only. Volume of identity merges + how many events each merge rewrote.

metrics.name: stackra.analytics.consent.suppression_ratio_gauge
metrics.description: % of captured events suppressed by consent gate over past 24h. Healthy: 0-15%. High = tenant needs to review consent flow UX.
